name: Hopping John
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the bacon or salt pork into a large saucepan.
2. Add the water and bring to boiling.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 45 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, sort and thoroughly wash the peas.
5. Add the peas gradually to the bacon and water so boiling will not stop.
6. Cover pan and simmer about 1-1/2 hours, or until peas are almost tender, stirring occasionally.
7. Gradually add the remaining ingredients so boiling will not stop.
8. Cover and simmer about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until a kernel of rice is soft when pressed between fingers.
9. If necessary, add more boiling water during cooking.
10. Remove bacon and drain pea-rice mixture thoroughly in a colander or sieve.
11. Cover colander with a clean cloth; set over hot water until ready to serve.
12. Slice the bacon and keep warm.
13. To serve, turn the pea-rice mixture into a warm serving bowl and garnish with parsley.
14. Accompany with the sliced bacon.
